emails.subject: FW: Griffith Sales
emails.body: FW: Griffith Sales Kim: I know you cannot control this. If we can say anything to give our side of the story, we should. Grigsby should know that the customer is a little pissed. C To: Foster, Chris H.; Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Griffith Sales
emails.body: RE: Griffith Sales FYI, We are addressing this today. Grigsby knows they are pissed and he knows that I am pissed. If they expect me to continue to sell products involving service from their desk, and they get paid for that service, they are going to have to do a better job. Citizens isn't the only one that I feel has service issues from the desk. To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Griffith Sales
emails.body: Get 'em Kim!! C To: Foster, Chris H.
